title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Docplexus Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Docplexus Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the Docplexus Digital Technologies family as a Frontend Developer in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Docplexus Digital Technologies:
Docplexus Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus Digital Technologies!
